mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_draft( member_id, review_draft_title, review_draft_content, review_draft_saved_at, review_draft_related ) VALUES( #{memberId}, #{reviewDraftTitle}, #{reviewDraftContent}, NOW(), #{reviewDraftRelated} )
mapper.select: SELECT review_draft_id AS reviewDraftId, member_id AS memberId, review_draft_title AS reviewDraftTitle, review_draft_content AS reviewDraftContent, review_draft_saved_at AS reviewDraftSavedAt, review_draft_related FROM review_draft WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
